description: A modern analytics dashboard designed for performance monitoring and data visualization, focused on clarity and quick insight delivery.
overview: Hyperview was designed to help teams monitor real-time performance metrics through a clean, information-dense dashboard. The challenge was balancing data density with visual clarity — giving users everything they need without overwhelming them.

description: A recognition and rewards mobile app designed to celebrate achievements and milestones within organizations and teams.
overview: Medal of Honor is a gamified recognition platform that makes employee appreciation feel meaningful and fun. The design focused on creating an emotional, celebratory experience that motivates continued excellence.

description: A public transit companion app designed to simplify commuting through real-time tracking, route planning, and fare management.
overview: Transit Ease tackles the frustration of daily commuting by providing a unified experience for route discovery, live tracking, and contactless payments — all in a minimal, accessible interface.

description: A minimal e-commerce mobile app for a clothing brand, focused on a clean browsing and checkout experience that puts the product first.
overview: Basic Clothing is a fashion e-commerce app designed around the philosophy of restraint — letting the clothes speak. The design strips away visual noise to create a premium, editorial shopping experience.

description: A mobile app that blends food delivery with social discovery — helping users find great food and like-minded people to share meals with.
overview: This project combined two distinct user needs — finding good food and meeting new people — into a single cohesive experience. The design challenge was making both journeys feel natural without one overshadowing the other.
